description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs. American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion. Height: 44 cm Width: 34 cm Depth: 11 cm Warranty: 1 year Made of polyester for durability One main zipped compartment, with a laptop compartment to carry an 11.6" laptop with a velcro closure One zipped compartment on the front for enhanced space One smaller zipped pocket with organiser pouches and a zipped pouch to carry your laptop cable One ear phones gate on the top One elasticated pocket on the left side and a zipped pocket on the right side Padded haul loop for easy carrying Two adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfort Branded zips and branding appliqué d on the front Back padding for ergonomic comfort and rubber legs at the base Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary
